title: Pickled Mediterranean Bread Flatbread
description: A low-glycemic-friendly flatbread recipe featuring a tangy pickled topping, crunchy sesame seeds, and a hint of Mediterranean spices. Perfect for a cozy snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the warm water, sugar, and yeast. Let it sit for 5 minutes, or until the yeast becomes frothy.
Add the flour, salt, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Punch down the dough, and roll it out into a thin circle, about 12 inches in diameter.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet, and sprinkle the sesame seeds evenly over the dough.
Drizzle the olive oil over the sesame seeds.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is cooked through.
While the flatbread is baking, combine the pickled cucumbers, garlic, oregano, and lemon juice in a bowl. Mix well to combine.
Once the flatbread is done, let it cool for 5 minutes, then top it with the pickled cucumber mixture and serve.
